# Step 4a: Create the site
curl -X PUT \
  "https://admin.hlx.page/config/aramark/sites/lake-powell.json" \
  -H "x-auth-token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Ijdzb2k4N3pkb3NJRnc4b19fbVR5a082QlVRNEZBVGhjaHlyNGZqY1dSbWcifQ..BvfBPQhSpPVyJ6qQqxFA8Y6Jk-qOjzfoEGVeCkeG3yiVC9RHCq4U8QgZusVaouBqtNxiT3rBSwDbZ9l58w51ndHJnW6ZR1-2RJUGEhHed9EKIaRcytJ77qnnyQTn5okKN6xJ65KZu69kGIaNvsokqp6Jt593jOhLjjIR3ZDKbw1ckQUtXjl5TF1ukzm8jDhBOzTDOgw2Fa6QEFrJU-3PAi5YP-O9qpJVyKbADFA2wHp44yWcORx9uKxXksXaK-VABNjVl7vHYguDaFl1gF2bGW1FHt-cMFWjNPm5WmNaSF75lqkG6YxXp-Yq2pfLiEFcXIUaMIeCFM65zFfXYbx_yQ" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "version": 1,
    "code": { "owner": "aramark", "repo": "aramark-mb" },
    "content": {
      "source": {
        "url": "https://author-p179307-e1885056.adobeaemcloud.com",
        "type": "markup",
        "suffix": ".html"
      }
    }
  }'

# Step 4b: Apply access config
curl -X POST \
  "https://admin.hlx.page/config/aramark/sites/lake-powell/access.json" \
  -H "x-auth-token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Ijdzb2k4N3pkb3NJRnc4b19fbVR5a082QlVRNEZBVGhjaHlyNGZqY1dSbWcifQ..BvfBPQhSpPVyJ6qQqxFA8Y6Jk-qOjzfoEGVeCkeG3yiVC9RHCq4U8QgZusVaouBqtNxiT3rBSwDbZ9l58w51ndHJnW6ZR1-2RJUGEhHed9EKIaRcytJ77qnnyQTn5okKN6xJ65KZu69kGIaNvsokqp6Jt593jOhLjjIR3ZDKbw1ckQUtXjl5TF1ukzm8jDhBOzTDOgw2Fa6QEFrJU-3PAi5YP-O9qpJVyKbADFA2wHp44yWcORx9uKxXksXaK-VABNjVl7vHYguDaFl1gF2bGW1FHt-cMFWjNPm5WmNaSF75lqkG6YxXp-Yq2pfLiEFcXIUaMIeCFM65zFfXYbx_yQ" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "admin": {
      "role": {
        "admin": ["mitchell-james1@aramark.com"],
        "config_admin": ["982121E0695E83A90A495FD0@techacct.adobe.com"]
      },
      "requireAuth": "auto"
    }
  }'

# Step 4c: Apply path mappings
curl -X POST \
  "https://admin.hlx.page/config/aramark/sites/lake-powell/public.json" \
  -H "x-auth-token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Ijdzb2k4N3pkb3NJRnc4b19fbVR5a082QlVRNEZBVGhjaHlyNGZqY1dSbWcifQ..BvfBPQhSpPVyJ6qQqxFA8Y6Jk-qOjzfoEGVeCkeG3yiVC9RHCq4U8QgZusVaouBqtNxiT3rBSwDbZ9l58w51ndHJnW6ZR1-2RJUGEhHed9EKIaRcytJ77qnnyQTn5okKN6xJ65KZu69kGIaNvsokqp6Jt593jOhLjjIR3ZDKbw1ckQUtXjl5TF1ukzm8jDhBOzTDOgw2Fa6QEFrJU-3PAi5YP-O9qpJVyKbADFA2wHp44yWcORx9uKxXksXaK-VABNjVl7vHYguDaFl1gF2bGW1FHt-cMFWjNPm5WmNaSF75lqkG6YxXp-Yq2pfLiEFcXIUaMIeCFM65zFfXYbx_yQ" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "paths": {
      "mappings": ["/content/lake-powell/:/"],
      "includes": ["/content/lake-powell/"]
    }
  }'
